item.title: Tesla, Inc.: AIR BAGS:SIDE/WINDOW:THORAX Recall (2024 tesla model 3)
item.summary: Tesla, Inc. (Tesla) is recalling one 2024 Model 3 vehicle. The driver seat side air bag module was assembled without a deflector that directs gas flow during deployment.
item.affectedPeople: Without a deflector, the air bag may deploy improperly, increasing the risk of injury during a crash.
item.remedy: Tesla service replaced the side air bag, free of charge. The affected vehicle was repaired April 12, 2024. Owners may contact Tesla customer service at 1-877-798-3752. Tesla's number for this recall is SB-24-13-001.
item.payoutAmount: Free repair, remedy, software update, or dealer service if stated by the NHTSA recall
